hero.headline: When it *breaks*, we show up
hero.subheadline: Door won't close? TV mount crooked? That leaky faucet driving you nuts? One call fixes it all.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: Everything that breaks, we handle
services_section.subheading: No job too small, no problem too weird

services.title: Door Installation & Repair
services.description: Sticky doors, broken frames, new installs — your door will open and close like butter when we're done.

services.title: TV Mounting & Setup
services.description: Perfect mounting height, hidden wires, sturdy installation. Your TV stays put, your walls stay pretty.

services.title: Painting & Touch-Ups
services.description: Fresh paint, clean lines, zero mess left behind. We match colors and fix what needs fixing.

services.title: General Repairs
services.description: Loose hinges, squeaky floors, wobbly fixtures — the everyday stuff that drives you crazy gets fixed right.

services.title: Faucet & Fixture Repair
services.description: Dripping faucets, running toilets, loose handles — small plumbing problems solved without the big bill.

about.heading: Charleston's go-to fix-it guy
about.body: Maddox and the Palm Property team have been solving Charleston's household headaches with honest pricing and solid work. We show up when we say we will, fix what needs fixing, and clean up after ourselves. It's really that simple.

reviews.name: Spencer O.
reviews.text: Maddox replaced our exterior door and frame perfectly — communicative, timely, and the door works like a dream now.

reviews.name: Neeto C.
reviews.text: Professional TV mount install, friendly service, and super quick turnaround. Will definitely use again.

reviews.name: Jay D.
reviews.text: Amazing experience with Palm Property Repairs — high quality work at a very reasonable price. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Jeff T.
reviews.text: Been using Maddox for over a year. Always on time, great communication, completes work as promised. Top notch.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Charleston and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Quick response times throughout the Lowcountry

cta.heading: Ready to get it fixed?
cta.body: Stop living with that broken whatever. One quick call and we'll have it working right again.
